reference: Seven weeks ago, I crushed my thumb with enough force to squeeze my nail out from the root in one complete piece. Since then, the thumb has shown a slight fracture, but I feel there is some more serious damage as it remains quite enlarged, with no joint movement and still painful. I wear a finger splint and wonder what could be the cause of these symptoms. The pad of my thumb has become rather hardened, and a small bump is present.
